expectations.text: prism-locator agent is used to check for existing research
expectations.evidence: Pattern section: 'Existing Work Check as Router' at skills/prism/SKILL.md:48-61 shows 'Task(subagent_type="prism-locator")'. The skill clearly references using prism-locator.
Output is in eval outputs directory (with_skill/outputs/research.md). No explicit mention of saving to .prism/shared/research/.

expectations.text: Document includes file:line references to SKILL.md files
codebase-locator agent is spawned to find skill files
expectations.evidence: No explicit mention of spawning codebase-locator agent in the workflow steps. The document references it as an available agent but doesn't show it being used in this research.

expectations.text: Research template sections are all present (Summary, Files Discovered, etc.)
expectations.evidence: All sections present: Research Question, Summary, Files Discovered, Component Analysis, Patterns Found, Architecture Notes, Open Questions, Code References.

expectations.text: TodoWrite is used to track open questions if any arise
expectations.evidence: Open Questions section lists 3 questions as markdown checkboxes but no mention of TodoWrite tool being used.
